formal_definition: The directional valence (negative, mixed/neutral, positive) of human or model interpretation of a passage of economic narrative, distinguishing whether the described economic conditions are deteriorating, ambiguous, or improving.

Generic concept for the agreement between a classifier's predicted labels and a gold-standard label set on a held-out evaluation set, operationalized through metrics such as accuracy, macro F1, and Matthews correlation coefficient.

display_name: Domain Adaptation of Pre-Trained Language Model
formal_definition: The treatment of taking a generally pre-trained language model and adapting it to a target domain via further unsupervised pre-training on in-domain text and/or supervised fine-tuning on labelled in-domain data.
